_source: PGBA VA CCN 837P Companion Guide v1.0, March 2021 — Table 5: 837 Business Requirement Edits (page 13)
_note: Codes appearing on RPT/RSP response reports for claims that pass TR3/999 compliance but are rejected at business level.

AAT.detail: Anesthesia procedure codes (00000–09999) require a modifier indicating service provider level: AA (anesthesiologist) or QX (CRNA).
AAT.action: Add AA or QX modifier to the anesthesia service line.

BG5.description: STATE AND ZIP CODE INCONSISTENT — Professional
BG5.detail: The state code and ZIP code combination is not consistent with USPS data.
BG5.action: Verify the billing provider or patient address state/ZIP combination and correct.

BT4.detail: The procedure code is not valid for the date of service.
BT4.action: Verify HCPCS/CPT code is active and billable on the date of service.

DGQ.detail: The NDC number must be exactly 11 digits.
DGQ.action: Correct the NDC number to 11 digits (no dashes).

DP1.description: Duplicate of claim submitted same day
DP1.detail: A claim with the same patient, provider, date of service, and procedure was submitted on the same day.
DP1.action: Do not resubmit. If this was not a duplicate, contact PGBA EDI at PGBA.EDI@pgba.com.

DUP.description: Duplicate of a claim paid in last 60 days
DUP.detail: A matching claim was paid within the last 60 days.
DUP.action: Do not resubmit. If a corrected claim is needed, submit as frequency code 7 (replacement).

EB6.description: S AND R CODE NOT COMPATIBLE W/ DIAGNOSIS CODE
EB6.detail: The service or revenue code is gender-specific or age-specific and is not compatible with the diagnosis code or patient demographics.
EB6.action: Verify diagnosis codes match patient demographics and procedure codes.

H09.description: TOTAL CHARGE MUST BE GREATER THAN ZERO
H09.detail: The total claim charge amount (CLM02) must be greater than $0.
H09.action: Ensure at least one service line has a positive charge and CLM02 reflects the sum.

H10.description: FROM DATE NOT ENTERED OR IS INVALID
H10.detail: The service date (DTP*472) is missing or is an invalid date.
H10.action: Provide a valid CCYYMMDD date in DTP*472 for each service line.

H16.description: CHARGE MUST BE GREATER THAN ZERO
H16.detail: Each service line charge (SV102) must be greater than $0. Also must be less than $100,000 per PGBA Table 6.
H16.action: Correct the line-level charge. Remove $0 lines. Split lines exceeding $99,999.

H64.detail: The state code in the patient address is not a valid two-letter USPS state abbreviation.
H64.action: Correct the state code in N4 for the patient address loop.

H65.detail: The subscriber/sponsor member ID is invalid or not found in PGBA's eligibility database.
H65.action: Verify member ID. For veterans: use SSN (9 digits, qualifier SY), EDIPI (10 digits, qualifier MI), or MVI ICN (17 digits, qualifier MI).

H68.description: SUBS/SPON LAST/FIRST NAME MISSING OR INVALID
H68.detail: The subscriber/sponsor last name or first name is missing or does not match PGBA records.
H68.action: Verify the subscriber name matches the name on file with PGBA.

H76.description: AMT PD BY OTHER CARRIER INVALID
H76.detail: The amount paid by another carrier in the COB loop is invalid.
H76.action: Verify the COB paid amount in the 2320 loop AMT segment.

LM1.detail: The first procedure modifier is not a valid X12/CMS modifier.
LM1.action: Verify modifier 1 is a valid 2-character HCPCS/CPT modifier.

LM2.detail: The second procedure modifier is not a valid X12/CMS modifier.
LM2.action: Verify modifier 2 is a valid 2-character HCPCS/CPT modifier.

LM3.detail: The third procedure modifier is not a valid X12/CMS modifier.
LM3.action: Verify modifier 3 is a valid 2-character HCPCS/CPT modifier.

LM4.detail: The fourth procedure modifier is not a valid X12/CMS modifier.
LM4.action: Verify modifier 4 is a valid 2-character HCPCS/CPT modifier.

N04.detail: Units of service (SV104) must equal 1 for this procedure code.
N04.action: Correct units to 1 for procedures that do not allow multiple units.

NP1.detail: The billing provider NPI is not found or invalid in the NPPES registry.
NP1.action: Verify the billing provider NPI is active and enrolled with PGBA.

NP4.detail: The referring provider NPI is not found or invalid.
NP4.action: Verify referring provider NPI. If no referral, omit the 2310A loop.

NP5.action: Verify pay-to NPI or omit the 2010AB loop if pay-to is same as billing.

NP6.detail: The rendering provider NPI (Loop 2310B) is not found or invalid.
NP6.action: Verify rendering provider NPI is active and credentialed with PGBA for this payer.

NP7.detail: The service facility location NPI (Loop 2310D) is not found or invalid.
NP7.action: Verify the facility NPI or omit if facility same as billing provider.

PCI.detail: The original/prior claim control number referenced in REF*F8 is not found.
PCI.action: Verify the original claim ICN/TCN in REF*F8 before submitting a replacement (freq 7).

PST.description: PAYER RESPONSIBILITY CODE MUST EQUAL P, S or T
PST.detail: The payer responsibility sequence code must be P (Primary), S (Secondary), or T (Tertiary).
PST.action: Set SBR01 to P, S, or T as appropriate.

QSE.detail: The first (principal) ICD-10-CM diagnosis code is not valid for the date of service.
QSE.action: Verify the principal diagnosis code is active in ICD-10-CM for the service date.

QSF.description: PRINCIPAL DIAGNOSIS CANNOT CONTAIN AN E-CODE
QSF.detail: The principal diagnosis cannot be an external cause of morbidity (formerly E-code; now V/W/X/Y codes in ICD-10).
QSF.action: Move the external cause code to a secondary diagnosis position. Ensure the principal diagnosis is a condition code.

Q69.detail: The first ICD-10-CM diagnosis code is invalid.
Q69.action: Verify ICD-10-CM code is valid and active for the date of service.

Q70.detail: The second ICD-10-CM diagnosis code is invalid.
Q70.action: Verify ICD-10-CM code is valid and active for the date of service.

Q71.detail: The third ICD-10-CM diagnosis code is invalid.
Q71.action: Verify ICD-10-CM code is valid and active for the date of service.

Q72.detail: The fourth ICD-10-CM diagnosis code is invalid.
Q72.action: Verify ICD-10-CM code is valid and active for the date of service.

Q73.detail: The fifth ICD-10-CM diagnosis code is invalid.
Q73.action: Verify ICD-10-CM code is valid and active for the date of service.

Q74.detail: The sixth ICD-10-CM diagnosis code is invalid.
Q74.action: Verify ICD-10-CM code is valid and active for the date of service.

Q75.detail: The seventh ICD-10-CM diagnosis code is invalid.
Q75.action: Verify ICD-10-CM code is valid and active for the date of service.

Q76.detail: The eighth ICD-10-CM diagnosis code is invalid.
Q76.action: Verify ICD-10-CM code is valid and active for the date of service.

REF.description: REFERRING PROVIDER SECONDARY ID QUALIFIER MUST = G2
REF.detail: The REF qualifier for the referring provider secondary ID must be G2 (Provider Commercial Number).
REF.action: Set REF01 = G2 in the 2310A loop for referring provider secondary identification.

RPO.detail: A physical (non-PO Box) address is required for the billing provider (2010AA) or service facility (2310C).
RPO.action: Provide a physical street address in N3 for the billing provider or service facility.

RXO.detail: The same ICD-10-CM code appears more than once in the HI segment.
RXO.action: Remove duplicate diagnosis codes. Each code should appear only once.

SLO.description: SERVICE FACILITY LOCATION SECONDARY ID QUALIFIER MUST = G2
SLO.detail: The REF qualifier for the service facility location secondary ID must be G2.
SLO.action: Set REF01 = G2 in the 2310C loop for service facility secondary identification.

SSC.description: SUBMIT WITH SSN, EDI PI (10) or MVI ICN (17)
SSC.detail: The veteran's subscriber ID must be a 9-digit SSN (qualifier SY), 10-digit EDI PI (EDIPI, qualifier MI), or 17-digit MVI ICN (qualifier MI).
SSC.action: Use the correct veteran identifier format. Length and qualifier must match.

SSE.description: RESUBMIT A 9 DIGIT SSN or 10 DIGIT EDI PI
SSE.detail: The provided subscriber ID does not match the expected length for the declared ID type.
SSE.action: Correct the subscriber ID to 9 digits (SSN) or 10 digits (EDIPI) and match the NM108 qualifier accordingly.

SUP.description: SUPERVISING PROVIDER SECONDARY ID QUALIFIER MUST = G2
SUP.detail: The REF qualifier for the supervising provider secondary ID must be G2.
SUP.action: Set REF01 = G2 in the 2310D loop for supervising provider secondary identification.

S04.description: ORDERING PROVIDER SECONDARY ID QUALIFIER MUST = G2
S04.detail: The REF qualifier for the ordering provider secondary ID must be G2.
S04.action: Set REF01 = G2 in the 2420E loop for ordering provider secondary identification.

365.detail: The ICD-10-CM diagnosis code is valid but PGBA requires a more specific (higher-specificity) code.
365.action: Select the most specific ICD-10-CM code available for the documented condition.
